title: Skeleton Key Domain Backdoor via mimikatz
description: Detects mimikatz misc::skeleton, which patches LSASS on a Domain Controller to install a master password ("skeleton key") that authenticates as any account while leaving existing passwords working.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*misc::skeleton*' or 'Command Line' like '*skeleton key*')))
